description: v012: Confidence floors + NegBin Ks (vr=2.2) + Gamma FS (vr=4.0). Derived from confidence-bucket analysis on 91,090 played-game predictions. HR model confirmed correct (89% LESS acc) - evaluation bug was filter, not model. HR added to tradeable list.

approach_1_confidence_floors.hitter_fantasy_score_more_floor_0.55: Filters 47.9-48.1% junk in 0.50-0.55 bucket (3,799 picks). Remaining 1,106 picks project at 59.1% (+2.4pp from 56.7%).
approach_1_confidence_floors.hitter_fantasy_score_less_floor_0.60: Filters 52.8-54.6% junk in 0.50-0.60 range (13,398 picks). Remaining 15,998 picks project at 59.5% (+2.4pp from 57.1%).
approach_1_confidence_floors.pitcher_strikeouts_more_floor_0.55: Filters 55.1% junk in 0.50-0.55 bucket (750 picks). Remaining 1,815 picks project at 62.4% (+3.5pp).
approach_1_confidence_floors.pitcher_strikeouts_less_no_floor: Only 1,428 picks total; applying 0.60 floor drops to 525 (below 1000 min). Left unfiltered at 58.1%.

approach_5_variance_ratios.pitcher_strikeouts_negbin_vr2.2: Switching from Poisson to NegBin overdispersion (vr=2.2). Total accuracy +0.9pp (58.6%->59.5%). MORE improves to 60.2% (2,565 picks), marginal MORE picks shift to LESS.
approach_5_variance_ratios.hitter_fantasy_score_gamma_vr4.0: Confirmed: vr=4.0 matches v011 results exactly (MORE 56.7%, LESS 57.1%). Baked into defaults.

approach_4_hr_model.finding: HR model is CORRECT. P(1+HR in game) = 1-(1-rate)^PA gives proj 0.10-0.20 for most batters, always picks LESS vs 0.5 line.
approach_4_hr_model.root_cause_of_0.3pct: Evaluation bug: actual!=0 filter removes valid 0-HR games (player batted, no HR). These are LESS wins. True HR LESS accuracy = 38,782/(38,782+4,801) = 89%.
approach_4_hr_model.action: HR LESS added to tradeable_props. Confidence floor not needed (89% baseline). No code change to HR model needed.

approaches_not_implemented.approach_2_opposing_pitcher: Backtest JSON lacks opposing pitcher FIP/ERA fields. Cannot evaluate from stored data. Factor weight currently 1.0 - future: add opp_pitcher quality to backtest records.
approaches_not_implemented.approach_3_home_away: Backtest JSON lacks home/away or day/night fields. Cannot evaluate from stored data. Future backtest run should capture game_side per prediction.

metadata.notes: HR evaluation: actual=0 for HR is NOT a non-play (backtester filters game_pa>=2). HR zeros = valid 'player batted, no HR' results = LESS wins. Do NOT apply actual!=0 filter to HR records in future analysis. Approaches 2 and 3 (opposing pitcher quality weighting, home/away splits) cannot be evaluated from current backtest data - need fresh backtest with additional fields.
